claims.text: CRAFT hand is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.
claims.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

claims.text: Impacts concentrate at joints in hand contact scenarios.
claims.source_quote: Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

claims.text: Links carry most of the load in hand contact scenarios.
claims.source_quote: Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

claims.text: CRAFT places soft material at joints.
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid
CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid

claims.text: CRAFT uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.
claims.source_quote: uses rollingcontact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths

claims.text: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons

claims.text: The tendon-driven design keeps the form factor compact.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: The tendon-driven design keeps the fingers light.
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

claims.text: CRAFT improves strength compared to baseline in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT improves endurance compared to baseline in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT maintains comparable repeatability in structural tests.
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT improves handling of fragile items in teleoperation.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

claims.text: CRAFT improves handling of low-friction items in teleoperation.
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

claims.text: The hand covers 33 out of 33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.
claims.source_quote: the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy

claims.text: The design will be released open-source with vision-based teleoperation.
claims.source_quote: will be released open-source with visionbased teleoperation and simulation integration

claims.text: The design will be released open-source with simulation integration.
claims.source_quote: will be released open-source with visionbased teleoperation and simulation integration
